en: to whatever the hell this is exactly. What, am I eighth grade hall monitor?
Current whereabouts? Let me tell you something. Whoa.
Now, when I say I'm looking for Pinkman, we both know why, don't we?
ko: 내가 핑크맨을 찾고 있다고 말할 때,

en: And you pretending otherwise only waste my time and serves to annoy me.
ko: 네가 그렇지 않다고 가장하는 건 내 시간만 낭비할 뿐이야

en: Mike, there are rules to this lawyer thing.
ko: 봐, 마이크, 이 변호사 일에는 규칙이 있어.

en: Is that right? Yeah. Attorney-client privilege.
I mean, that's a big one. And that's something I provide for you.
ko: 그리고 그건 내가 너에게 제공하는 거야.

en: So if I give up Pinkman, well, then you're going to be asking, old Saul gives them up pretty easy.
What's to keep him from giving me up? You see? So then where's the trust?
ko: 그럼 나를 포기하지 않게 할 이유가 뭐지?

en: I trust a hole in the desert I'd leave you in.
ko: 내가 너를 버릴 사막의 구멍을 믿어.
